examples: Before you go near a stockbroker, do your homework.
Last summer, he chucked his 10-year career as a stockbroker and headed for the mountains.
Why, the argument goes, should a car-driving pensioner from Lincolnshire have to subsidise the daily commute of a stockbroker from Surrey?
Unlike most careers in finance, being a stockbroker does not require a college degree.
Before Big Bang, share dealing was done through a stockbroker, who advised clients on dealings.
